description: Sanitized example policy for mapping team channels or threads to Context Fabric scopes.

routes.notes: Use for Acme Shop engineering and support-agent context.
Example thread pattern. Keep incident data sanitized before adding it to a public demo.
Second fictional company to demonstrate project isolation.

guardrails: Never use context from a different project unless a route explicitly allows cross-project comparison.
Treat redacted values as unavailable, not as blanks to infer.
Keep raw memories and private channel maps outside the public repository.
Run an eval case before broadening a policy to more channels or threads.
